verses.text: Gamdangte' thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi

Josiah' tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum li a phak hunin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Eufratis gun gei Karkhemish khua-ah Egypt kumpipa Faro Neko simin a zo hi. Egypt kumpipa' galkapte tawh kisai-in hih bangin a hong gen hi
“Na lumte uh la un la galsim dingin kuankhia un
Sakol vante vawh un la, tuang ta un, sakol galkapte aw. Na sik lukhute uh khu un la, na teipite uh tat hiamin, na sik puante uh silh un
“A bangci mawk ahi hiam? Amaute lungmangin a nungkik ta uh hi. A galkapte uh kilehhawl a, lau-in taikekmang mawk uh hi. Kinungleh hei kiklo uh hi; mun khempeuhah launa vive
A manlang pente zong paikhia thei tuanlo uh a, galkapte zong suaktalo uh hi. Leilu lam Eufratis gun gei-ah hoi-in a tuk uh hi
Nail gunpi bangin a hong khang, guntui khang a bang kua ahi hiam
Nail gunpi bangin Egypt gam hong khang a, guntui khang hong bang hi. Amah in, kei ka khang ding a, leitung khempeuh ka tuam ding hi. Khuapite leh a sunga teng mite ka susia ding hi, a ci hi
Sakolte aw, mai nawt un; sakol leengte aw, hat un! Lum a tawi Ethiopia mite leh Put mite aw, thal tawi a siam Lud mite aw, na galkapte uh kuansak un

“Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni pen Vanglian Topa Pasian ' ni hi a, phu a lakkik ni, a galte a thuk ni ahi hi. Namsau in amaute that ding a, a kham mateng a si uh a dawn ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Eufratis gun gei leilu lamah amaute biakna-in a nei hi
Egypt nungakte aw, Gilead gamah pai un la, damna zatui va la un. Zatui tampi na zat khit uh hangin damna na ngah tuan kei uh hi
Gamdangte in na zumhuaina uh hong za khin uh a, leitung bupah na kahna aw uh kiza hi. Na galkapte uh khatlekhat kiphukha-in, a nihun a pukkhawm uh hi,” a hong ci hi
Egypt gam a sim dingin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' hong paina tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei kiangah a hong gen hi
“Egypt gam leh Migdol khua-ah va gen in. Memfis khua leh Tahpanhes khua-ah va taangko in: ‘Kigingsa leh kithawisa-in om un; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau tawh note hong kithat khin ding hi,’ va ci in
Bang hangin na bawngtal pasian uh Apis guallelin taimang ahi hiam? Topa in amah a vattuk hang ahi hi

Na mite uh tampi tak hoi-in tuk uh a, amaute in khatlekhat kiangah, ‘Kithawi dih un; i mipihte kiang, i suahna gamah va ciahkik ni; tua hi leh hih namsau tawh sihna pan i suakta ding hi,’ a kici uh hi
“Egypt kumpipa Faro, min thak khat pia un la, ‘Kam si bekin hun mawk beisakpa,’ ci ta un
Vanglian Topa keimah Kumpipa ka hi hi. Taber mual, mual khempeuh sangin sangzaw-in, Karmel mual, tuipi tungah sangpi-in a dawktoh bangin, no hong simpa' thahatna a lian mahmah ding hi
Egypt gamah a tengte aw, note salin a hong kipaipih cianga ding na puanlomte uh zialkhol un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Memfis khua gamlak suak ding a, kisia gawpin, kuamah tenglo ding hi
Egypt gam, bawngla hoih mahmah tawh a kibang hi. Leilu lam panin a hong leeng cippi in amah a pet hi

A galkap cialte nangawn amaute' lakah bawngno hatlote a bang lel uh hi. Pangloin, do tentanlo uh a, nungkikin a taikek uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' kisiat ding ni, amau' gimthuak ding ni, hong tungzo hi
A galte uh hong kuan uh ahih manin Egypt mite gul tai bangin zutkhat a kisuah uh hi. A galte uh sing phuk bangin hei tawh hong kuan uh hi
Gam pha lua-in a kiphut zawhloh hangin a galte un a singte uh a phukmaisak teitei ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kauphe sangin tamzaw uh a, simzawhloh zahin a tam uh hi
Egypt nungakte a maizum ding uh hi. Leilu lam panin a hong pai mite' khutsungah amaute a kipia ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi

Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in, “En un: Keimah in Thebes khua-a Amon pasian leh Faro kumpipa-a kipan a pasian-te uh leh a kumpite uh, Egypt kumpipa leh amah a muang mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi
Amaute a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar leh a uliante' khutsungah amaute ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Topa in kong cihin-ah, nidang lai bangin Egypt gamah mi a tengkik ding hi

Ahih hangin lau kei un, ka nasempa Jakob' suante aw. Patau kei un, Israel mite aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi panin note kong honkhia ding a, na suanlekhakte uh saltan'na gam panin kong honkhia ding hi. Jakob' suante hong ciahkik ding uh a, nuamtakin a om ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi

Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka nasem Jakob' suante aw, lau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia khin ding a, ahih hangin note kong susia khin kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh ding a, gim pialoin kong mawk koih kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
